# MINNAL

> Fast Tasks. Sharp Focus. A bold, modern task manager for focused work — real-time, dark-mode-first, and built for momentum.

MINNAL is a collaborative productivity app for individuals and small teams. It offers a kanban board, list view, workspaces, comments, mentions, notifications, and an activity feed.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and pricing for MINNAL.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/login): Account sign-in.
- [Create account](/register): New account signup.
